productDisplayName: Fusion Beats Women Dark Pink Tunic
description: Style Note We like the range of bright and colourful tunics, kurtas and kurtis that comes our way from fusion beats. They can be easily styled and never fail to catch hold of the latest fashion trends. Pair these with solid leggings and strappy flats for an ethnic look with a twist. Product Details Dark pink sleeveless tunic, has a round neckline with blue piping around it, mock placket with blue tape detail on it and embroidered detail on either side of it, embroidered detail around the arm holes in front and two insert welt pockets with embroidered detail on it Material and Care Blended Hand wash cold Do not iron on decorations Size Regular Fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
